title: FCDO Supplementary Estimate Memorandum 2024 to 2025
body: "This memorandum gives further explanation of the FCDO’s entry in HM Treasury’s 2024 to 2025 Supplementary Estimates presented to Parliament on 11 February 2025.  It is divided into 3 sections:   FCDO objectives, budgets, main areas of spending and drivers for changes in spending including efficiency initiatives detail on budget changes presented in the Supplementary Estimate, in particular additional funding from the Treasury, funding returned to the Treasury and budget transfers between central government departments how FCDO spending relates to performance against priorities, and details of major FCDO projects   Parliament votes separately for the Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office Overseas Superannuation Account because, for supply purposes, it is deemed to be a department in its own right. The memorandum provides changes to the Overseas Superannuation Account budgets in the HM Treasury’s 2024 to 2025 Supplementary Estimates. "
